Senior HR Executive (Talent Acquisition) |Driving End-to-End Hiring Success for Global IT Projects

We are hiring for Senior AI Engineer (GenAI & RAG Specialist)
Experience- 8+years
Location-Remote
Mode-Contract
Share your cv - sanjana.patel@huemot.com
 
Role Overview
We are looking for a high-velocity AI Engineer to lead the development of our next-generation Generative AI platforms. You aren't just a coder; you are an architect of "intelligent" systems. You should be deeply comfortable with the Python ecosystem, obsessed with the efficiency of Cursor, and capable of taking a RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) concept from a local notebook to a globally scaled AWS production environment.


Key Responsibilities
Architect RAG Pipelines: Design and implement robust Retrieval-Augmented Generation systems using LangChain or LlamaIndex.
Vector Strategy: Manage high-performance vector databases (e.g., Pinecone, Weaviate, or ChromaDB) for efficient data retrieval.
AI-First Development: Utilize Cursor and LLM-augmented workflows to maintain 2x development velocity while ensuring code quality.
End-to-End Deployment: Own the lifecycle of AI models—from local development to automated deployment using GitHub Actions and AWS CodePipeline.
Scalable Infrastructure: Build and maintain inference APIs using FastAPI or Flask, hosted on AWS (SageMaker, Lambda, or ECS).
ML Integration: Seamlessly integrate traditional Machine Learning (Scikit-Learn, XGBoost) with modern LLM capabilities.
#SeniorAIEngineer #GenAI #RAGSpecialist #AIEngineer #AWS
